positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. Highly detailed silhouette of ancient, stylized bioluminescent trees reaching towards a crescent moon and scattered constellations. The foreground features abstract, root-like patterns blending into the ground. Use a deep indigo, cosmic teal, and shimmering gold color palette. Strong, clean black silhouettes contrasted against luminous gradients. Excellent contrast, graphic design style, suitable for screen printing, central composition, high detail, 8k, --ar 1:1
